task_name: Pick up the trophy and place it on the dresser, then grab the basketball
instruction: I'm the MVP of the basketball league. Next to a painting on my bookshelf is my MVP trophy; I want to place it on the dresser , then pick up the basketball and work out
target_description: I'm the MVP of the basketball league. Next to a painting on my bookshelf is my MVP trophy; I want to place it on the dresser , then pick up the basketball and work out
